title: Marketo Tech Stack Guide

Marketo Tech Stack Guide

Note: Refer to the Tech Stack Index to browse Apps and Tech Stack Applications to manage Apps.

To see the different systems that are connected to Marketo, please visit the Marketo System Infrastructure Mapping FigJam .

Marketo is a flat database that utilizes Email Address as the unique ID. The Person Object is the main object.
